display.purpose: Hero page title only ('Dunp-ingo'). Inter 800, tight leading.

title.purpose: Status figures and panel headings. Inter 900.

body.purpose: Cell labels, hints, list buttons, forms. Inter 800 — no light weight exists.

label.purpose: The single hero eyebrow and status captions. Uppercase, 0.78rem.

shadows.name: button-lift
shadows.purpose: Nav links and primary buttons — small flick-able objects.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Panels, status block, board wrapper, modal — hero surfaces lifted high.

shadows.name: compact-lift
shadows.purpose: BINGO banner, face bubbles, and mobile board wrapper.

shadows.name: cell-hover
shadows.purpose: The one soft, straight-down shadow — a cell lifting on hover ('about to peel it off').

motion.name: state-ease
motion.value: transform 150ms ease, background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease

motion.name: bubble-pop
motion.purpose: Face-bubble pop-out easing — fast overshoot then settle.

motion.name: banner-pop
motion.purpose: BINGO banner entrance — pops in, holds, pops out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Nav links and main actions — a sky-blue sticker that lifts off the page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: #7dd3fc; color: #1d1d1f; font-weight: 900; padding: 9px 13px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #1d1d1f; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(1px, 1px); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1d1d1f; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translate(4px, 4px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 #1d1d1f; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1d1d1f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: List Button
components.description: Full-width menu row that sits flush inside a panel — no shadow, no lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-list { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: left; border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: #fffdf8; color: #1d1d1f; font-weight: 900; padding: 9px 13px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-list:hover { background: #f8f2e9; } .ds-btn-list:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1d1d1f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Bingo Cell
components.description: The core interactive square. Hover lifts it; marked turns it lime with a mint check stamp.
components.css: .ds-cell { position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center; min-height: 116px; padding: 12px; border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: #fffdf8; color: #25211b; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: transform 150ms ease, background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-cell span { font-weight: 800; font-size: clamp(.76rem, 1.65vw, 1rem); line-height: 1.18; } .ds-cell:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 rgba(29,29,31,.2); } .ds-cell:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1d1d1f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Bingo Cell — Marked
components.description: A marked square: lime fill with a circular mint check badge stamped top-right.
components.css: .ds-cell-marked { background: #d9f99d; } .ds-cell-marked::after { content: '\2713'; position: absolute; top: 7px; right: 9px; display: grid; place-items: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; color: #1d1d1f; font-weight: 900; }

components.name: Bingo Cell — Bonus
components.description: A bonus / free square: marigold fill with a large check above the label.
components.css: .ds-cell-bonus { background: #ffd166; } .ds-cell-bonus::before { content: '\2713'; display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-size: 1.6rem; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: The base container — a translucent off-white sticker lifted high off the gradient.
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,253,248,.78); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 #1d1d1f; padding: 14px; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.55rem; color: #1d1d1f; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Inputs are stickers too — same outline vocabulary, ink focus, no colored glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: #fffdf8; color: #1d1d1f; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6f6a62; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-width: 3px; }

components.name: BINGO Banner
components.description: The win klaxon — fixed pink banner that pops in, tilted, with a confetti burst.
components.css: .ds-banner { display: inline-block; border: 2px solid #1d1d1f; border-radius: 8px; background: #ff5c8a; color: #fff; font-size: 1.65rem; font-weight: 900; padding: 12px 24px; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #1d1d1f; transform: rotate(-3deg); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-banner { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview: Dunp-ingo looks like a sheet of glossy stickers you want to peel off and press onto your laptop. Every surface shares one vocabulary: a thick 2px black outline, a gently rounded 8px corner, and a hard, blur-free drop shadow offset down and to the right. Nothing recedes softly; everything sits up off the page like a die-cut object. The palette is candy — sky blue, lime, marigold, hot pink — over a warm-to-mint-to-lilac gradient with an amber glow, the way light catches vinyl. This is a game for colleagues, not an analytics tool, and it refuses the SaaS-dashboard register entirely: no hairline borders, no soft ambient shadows, no muted-gray text, no hero-metric template. Refinement means tighter alignment and honest contrast — never sanding off the joy. Type is heavy single-family Inter at 800–900, so even body copy has presence, and marking a square or hitting BINGO is celebrated loudly with confetti, a rotating pink banner, and a colleague's face popping out of the cell. The whole thing is phone-first.
keyCharacteristics: Thick 2px ink outlines on every interactive surface — no hairlines.
Hard offset shadows with zero blur (Npx Npx 0 #1d1d1f) — the signature material.
One 8px corner radius across the system; full stadium (999px) for status pills/badges; circles only for check stamps and avatars.
Candy color used as function, not decoration: lime = marked, marigold = bonus, pink = BINGO.
Heavy single-family type (Inter 800–900) on a warm gradient backdrop.
Phone-first: every surface tested at ≤560px before desktop.

rules.name: The One-Ink Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one structural color: #1d1d1f. Every border, every shadow, and all primary text use it. Never introduce a second dark — no charcoal shadows, no gray borders. (Oxblood #b42318 is allowed only for error states.)

rules.name: The Color-Means-Something Rule
rules.body: Saturated fills are functional, not decorative. Lime means marked, marigold means bonus, pink means BINGO. Never use a candy color just to add color to a neutral surface.

rules.name: The Weight-Is-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from weight and size within Inter, never from a second font. If you need contrast, go heavier (900) or bigger, not different.

rules.name: The One-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label appears exactly once — the hero kicker. Never stack a small all-caps eyebrow above every panel.

rules.name: The Zero-Blur Rule
rules.body: Shadows are solid ink offsets, never blurred. The second-to-last value is always 0. A blur radius on a structural surface breaks the sticker metaphor and reads as a dated 2014 app.

dos: Do outline every interactive surface with a 2px #1d1d1f border and an 8px radius.
Do use hard, zero-blur offset shadows (4px 4px 0 for buttons, 8px 8px 0 for panels, 5px 5px 0 for floating/celebration).
Do keep candy color functional — lime = marked, marigold = bonus, pink = BINGO.
Do keep all text on the ink end of the ramp (#1d1d1f) on candy backgrounds, and reserve Muted Ink (#6f6a62) for true secondary metadata only.
Do design and test phone-first: board, leaderboard, and marking must be flawless at ≤560px before desktop.
Do add a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback for the BINGO banner, face bubbles, and confetti.
donts: Don't use blurred or soft ambient shadows on any structural surface.
Don't introduce a second structural dark — one ink (#1d1d1f) only (oxblood #b42318 for errors only).
Don't drift toward the SaaS-dashboard register: no hairline borders, no muted-gray body text on tint, no hero-metric template.
Don't pair Inter with a second typeface. Get contrast from weight and size.
Don't stack a small uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't nest a lifted card inside another lifted card.
Don't refine the fun away — tighten alignment and contrast, never trade the playful identity for 'more professional'.
